title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Trader loses $2M in ‘same-block backrun extraction’ exploit
summary: One crypto trader noted the $2 million loss could have been prevented had the victim read the transaction route before signing the transaction.

title: Mubadala Opens Credit Business to Outsiders
summary: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Investment Co. is opening up one of its largest investment businesses to outside investors for the first time, Dinesh Nair reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Adnoc to Buy Shell's South African Fuel Stations
summary: Adnoc Distribution is has agreed to buy Shell fuel stations across South Africa in a deal valued at $1 billion. CEO Bader Saeed Al Lamki explained the rationale behind the move to Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
After years of development, UTEXO—backed by Tether—rolls out Bitcoin-native USDT with client-side validation, slashing fees and middlemen compared to Tron or Ethereum rails.

title: ByteDance and Alibaba to Pull Agent Features as China Cracks Down on Humanlike AI
summary: Beijing's first rules targeting emotional AI are forcing the country's biggest apps to shut down custom agents.

title: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
summary: Yvette Cooper said governments must agree on AI safeguards before frontier systems transform warfare, crime, and society.

title: What Is the U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve?
summary: The U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve is a government-held stockpile of bitcoin, established by executive order in March 2025. The order treats Bitcoin as a long-term reserve asset, comparable to how the country holds gold, and directs that the coins placed in the reserve are not to be sold. Almost all

title: Grayscale says Strategy’s recent bitcoin sales should restore confidence in its financing structure
summary: "Strategy is selling more bitcoin. But this will restore confidence in its financing structure and help bitcoin find a more durable bottom."

title: Greek shipping companies made almost $4bn carrying Russian oil in past three years
summary: Dynacom Tankers, Stealth Maritime and Onassis Group boost revenues from transporting Russian fuel under G7 price cap regime
